summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of 5-role RBAC platform with dedicated portals. All 17 backend API tests passed. All 8 frontend features tested with 7 fully working. Minor issue: Parent Skill Breakdown section shows empty (API doesn't return skill details in dashboard response).

integration_issues.issue: Skill Breakdown section shows empty - dashboardData.students[].skills is undefined (API doesn't return skill details)

passed_tests: ✅ Login page shows all 5 role buttons (Student, Teacher, Parent, Admin, Sales)
✅ Student login -> Student picker shows 3 demo students -> Select student -> Adventure map renders with floating stats badge (13/20 Islands Conquered)
✅ Teacher login -> Teacher dashboard loads with 3 students, KPI cards, and navigation to student detail works
✅ Parent login -> Parent portal shows child overview with 74% mastery, 4/20 skills mastered, stats cards (Practice Sessions, Skills Mastered, Anxiety Indicators)
✅ Admin login -> Admin portal shows System Status, Key Metrics (3 students, 43 nodes, 74% avg mastery), Enrolled Students table
✅ Admin Content Management: 6 Generate Problems buttons visible (N01-N06) with data-testid attributes
✅ Admin Content Management: Generate All Images button visible and clickable
✅ Sales login -> Sales portal shows Pipeline Value ($1.6M), Active Pilots (4), District Pipeline table with progress bars, Upcoming Demos
✅ Sign Out from all portals works correctly and redirects to /login
action_items: OPTIONAL: Enhance /api/teacher/dashboard to include skills array in student objects for Parent portal skill breakdown feature
critical_code_review_comments: Parent portal's Skill Breakdown feature depends on childDetail.skills which is not returned by the teacher/dashboard API. Consider adding a separate API call to get detailed skill progress or enhance the dashboard API response.
Sales pipeline data is correctly documented as MOCK data in SalesHome component (mockPipeline array)

success_rate.frontend: 87.5% (7/8 features fully working - skill breakdown empty)

seed_data_creation: Uses pre-seeded demo students: student-001 (Alex Champion), student-002 (Jordan Struggling), student-003 (Sam Careful)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All RBAC portals working. Backend APIs tested comprehensively. Admin Content Management buttons exist with proper data-testid attributes (gen-problems-N01 through N06, gen-images-batch). DO NOT click these buttons in testing - they trigger actual AI generation. Sales pipeline data is MOCK. Parent skill breakdown requires API enhancement to populate.
mocked_data_note: Sales pipeline data in SalesHome is MOCK DATA (mockPipeline array with Austin ISD, Houston ISD, Dallas ISD, San Antonio ISD). All other portals use real API data.
